mapper.select: select (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 1) as InfantsAndToddlers, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 2) as PreschoolChildren, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 3) as SchoolAgeChildren, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 4) as YoungAdults, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 5) as Adults, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 6) as MiddleAgedAdults, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 7) as Elderly6570, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 8) as Elderly7175, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 9) as Elderly7680, (select count(*) from phr_population where population_composition = 10) as Elderly80Plus
select (select count(*) from phr_population where isLocal = 0) as IsNotLocal, (select count(*) from phr_population where isLocal = 1) as IsLocal
select (select count(*) from phr_population where isResident = 0) as IsResident, (select count(*) from phr_population where isResident = 1) as IsNotResident

select p.id as populationTableId, r.area_name, r.registration_name, p.person_name, p.house_relationship, p.identity_number, p.contact_phone, r.person_number, p.household_location, r.id as registrationId, r.area_id, p.birth_date, p.registration_property, p.sex, r.operation_datetime from phr_population p inner join phr_registration r on p.registration_name = r.registration_name
p.registration_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.registrationName}, '%')
and ( person_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchParam}, '%') or contact_phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchParam}, '%') or identity_number LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.searchParam}, '%') )
and p.household_location LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.householdLocation}, '%')
and village_id = #{param.villageId}
AND r.area_id IN
#{areaId}
order by r.operation_datetime desc

select p.id as populationTableId, r.area_name, r.registration_name, p.person_name, p.house_relationship, p.identity_number, p.contact_phone, r.person_number, p.household_location, r.id as registrationId, r.area_id, p.birth_date, p.registration_property, p.sex, r.operation_datetime from phr_population p inner join phr_registration r on p.registration_name = r.registration_name
r.area_id IN
#{areaId}
order by r.operation_datetime desc
